title: dasyphyllum flagellare
intro: Dasyphyllum flagellare is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, commonly known as a shrub with thorny stems and small yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dasyphyllum flagellare include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, infusions, and extracts, often used to promote wound healing, skin health, and immune system support.
